title: Breathable
description: Defines what blocks this entity can breathe in and gives them the ability to suffocate.

total_supply.title: Total air supply
total_supply.description:
Time in seconds the entity can hold its breath.

Sample values:
• bat: 15

suffocate_time.title: Suffocate length
suffocate_time.description: Time in seconds between suffocation damage.

breathes_air.title: Breathes in air
breathes_air.description: If set, this entity can breathe in air.

breathes_lava.title: Breathes in lava
breathes_lava.description: If set, this entity can breathe in lava.

breathes_solids.title: Breathes in solids
breathes_solids.description: If set, this entity can breathe in solid blocks.

breathes_water.title: Breathes in water
breathes_water.description:
If set, this entity can breathe in water.

Sample values:
• bogged: true

generates_bubbles.title: Generates Bubbles
generates_bubbles.description: If set, this entity will have visible bubbles while in water.

inhale_time.title: Inhale Time
inhale_time.description: Time in seconds to recover breath to maximum.

breathe_blocks.title: Breathable blocks
breathe_blocks.description: List of blocks this entity can breathe in, in addition to the selected items above.

non_breathe_blocks.title: Non-breathable blocks
non_breathe_blocks.description: List of blocks this entity cannot breathe in, in addition to the selected items above.
